name: Number → Increment
description: This is an [Action](https://esphome.io/automations/actions#all-actions) for incrementing a number value by its step size (default: 1).

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: The ID of the number component to update.

config_entries.label: Cycle
config_entries.description: Whether or not to set the number to its minimum value when the increment pushes the value beyond its maximum value. This will only work when the number component uses a minimum and maximum value. Defaults to `true`.
